title: Avatar
description: Compact identity surface: photo, initials, generated initials from a full name, or a named icon. Variant and appearance align with Fluent tokens; size and shape tune density for lists versus profile headers.
intro: Supply `image` when you have a URL, `initials` for explicit letters, or `name` to derive up to two characters. Without those, set `icon` or accept the default person glyph. `loading` swaps content for a spinner while `ariaLabel` or `name` feeds the required accessible name on the `img` role host.

featureSections.title: Image, initials, name, or icon
featureSections.description: Content resolves in order: image when `image` is set and not loading, otherwise initials from `initials` or parsed `name`, otherwise `icon`, otherwise the stock person icon. Pair missing visible text with `ariaLabel`.

featureSections.title: Variant and appearance
featureSections.description: Variant picks semantic color; appearance controls fill weight the same way as buttons and badges. Use combinations to reflect participation, risk, or hierarchy without swapping the whole layout.

featureSections.title: Size and shape
featureSections.description: `size` maps to Fluent density steps; `shape` trades rounded rectangles for circles or squares so lists and cards stay visually aligned.

featureSections.title: Disabled and loading
featureSections.description: `disabled` lowers contrast and sets `aria-disabled`. `loading` keeps the frame, shows a spinner overlay, and sets `aria-busy` until the portrait or metadata resolves.

featureSections.title: Collaborator strip
featureSections.description: Stacked small circular avatars next to metadata show who is in a room or on a ticket—add a secondary button for the obvious next step without building custom chrome.

featureSections.title: Profile header
featureSections.description: Large circular portrait plus text column and a primary action is the canonical account summary you can lift into settings or directory drawers.

accessibility.title: Accessible name
accessibility.body: The host is `role="img"`. Provide `ariaLabel`, or `name` (also used for initials), or rely on i18n fallback text. When only `initials` are shown, set `ariaLabel` if those letters are not enough to identify the person or workspace.

accessibility.title: Photograph
accessibility.body: Inner `` uses an empty `alt` because the host carries the name; avoid duplicating long descriptions on both layers.

accessibility.title: Busy and disabled
accessibility.body: `loading` sets `aria-busy="true"`. `disabled` sets `aria-disabled="true"` while the surface stays in the tree for layout continuity.

apiSections.title: AvatarComponent - ui-avatar
apiSections.lead: Decorative identity chip. Not a focusable control—wrap in a button or link when the avatar itself should open a profile or menu.

blocks.title: Inputs
rows: Optional photo URL; shown when present and not loading.
Up to two displayed characters; uppercase slice of input.
Full name for initials derivation and accessible name fallback.
Fluent icon when no image or initials render.
Spinner overlay, suppresses image until finished.

paragraphs: When `name` produces initials from multiple words, first and last word initials combine; a single token yields one letter.
Spinner size scales with avatar `size` through an internal map.
